rows.label: tev031601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Aganeba about Candid & Credible's weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031601_MSG0001
rows.name:
Authentic Candid & Credible
weaponry hits its target like a
bolt from the blue, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031601_MSG0002
rows.name:
Our weapons are pretty much perfect if you need to
fry fishy indigens like lophids or a gaggle of
Growth puges. They do whopping damage, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Though I imagine you're probably better off
tackling bug-like indigens such as the forfex
with attacks of either fire or ether?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031601_MSG0004
rows.name:
But all the same, you you really should use C&C
weapons if possible. You haven't lived until you've
shocked a forfex into oblivion, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031601_MSG0008
rows.name:
Well, I sort of leave the actual production to my
associates? I prefer the easy job, which is to stand
here and spout technology to interested parties...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031601_MSG0009
rows.name:
Did I mention that Matthew
pays me in scrumptious pizza
if I do a really good job?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031601_MSG0010
rows.name:
And that I get an extra pie if I feign reluctance
at giving away all our secrets? Which is why
I'm not going to to to say another word![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031601_MSG0011
rows.name:
He's kind of like my own personal
pizza dispenser, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031601_MSG0012
rows.name:
He'd probably be mad if he heard me say
that, huh? Maybe I should manage this
symbiotic relationship a little more carefully?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031601_MSG0013
rows.name:
Mira is home to an indigen with large
pincers called the "forfex," you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031601_MSG0014
rows.name:
It expels ether foam from its mouth and has
armor that can repel bullets, which makes
it a particularly nasty foe, I suppose?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031601_MSG0015
rows.name:
But if you can destroy its head, I
think you can salvage a delicious
little something known as forfex miso?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031601_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'm really fascinated with forfexes,
aren't I? I wonder why that is?[ST:wait ]
